g.text: Equivalent atoms per graph (50 directed neighbors)

RTX 4090, FP32, 64 channels, avg. directed degree 16. Columns are fixed configurations; compiled = make_fx for training and AOTI for inference. Axes are converted from measured directed-edge counts to 50-neighbor-equivalent atoms. Missing points are failed/OOM runs.
